name: ClassSchedule
description: Implementation of the 'ClassSchedule' model. Represents a single class instance. The class meets at the start time, goes until the end time.

Course.description: Contains information about the course that the enrollment is a part of.

SemesterId.description: The semester ID for the enrollment (if any).

IsAvailable.description:
When `true`, indicates that the enrollment shows in consumer mode, has not started yet, and there is room in each class of the enrollment.
When `false`, indicates that either the enrollment does not show in consumer mode, has already started, or there is no room in some classes of the enrollment.

Id.description: The unique ID of the class schedule.

DaySunday.description: When `true`, indicates that this schedule occurs on Sundays.

DayMonday.description: When `true`, indicates that this schedule occurs on Mondays.

DayTuesday.description: When `true`, indicates that this schedule occurs on Tuesdays.

DayWednesday.description: When `true`, indicates that this schedule occurs on Wednesdays.

DayThursday.description: When `true`, indicates that this schedule occurs on Thursdays.

DayFriday.description: When `true`, indicates that this schedule occurs on Fridays.

DaySaturday.description: When `true`, indicates that this schedule occurs on Saturdays.

AllowOpenEnrollment.description: When `true`, indicates that the enrollment allows booking after the enrollment has started.

AllowDateForwardEnrollment.description: When `true`, indicates that this the enrollment shows in consumer mode, the enrollment has not started yet, and there is room in each class of the enrollment.

StartTime.description: The time this class schedule starts.

EndTime.description: The time this class schedule ends.

StartDate.description: The date this class schedule starts.

EndDate.description: The date this class schedule ends.

Staff.description: Contains information about the staff member who is regularly scheduled to teach the class.

Location.description: Contains information about the regularly scheduled location of this class.

FrequencyInterval.description: The interval between class schedule occurencies.
